rationale: Reports Gucci's 2023 Seoul duty-free withdrawal as part of a multi-year luxury exodus tied to declining Korean duty-free/tourist retail, a negative retail-footprint narrative even though LV is the main subject.
Purely descriptive trade-press write-up of Gucci Beauty's autumn 2026 cosmetics/fragrance lineup with no evaluative verdict; brand-owned promo cadence.
Organic fan amplification of ambassador Lee Know wearing Gucci pieces; genuine but repetitive fandom sighting content, damped to mild magnitude per fandom trap.
